final:
module r_FAULT_STATUS_MASK(
    output reg [7:0] reg_0x15, 
    input wire rst_n, 
    input wire wenb, 
    input wire [7:0] in_data, 
    input wire clk
);

always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (rst_n) begin
        reg_0x15 <= 8'h00;
    end
    else begin
        if (wenb == 0) begin
            reg_0x15 <= in_data;
        end
    end
end

endmodule
